title: The Top 10 Claude Code Plugins to 10x Your Next Project (June '26)
summary: Chase AI reviews 10 Claude Code plugins for improving code project workflows. Featured tools include Graphify for knowledge graph generation without RAG, grill-me for skill assessment, various Claude integrations like claude-obsidian and NotebookLM, and MCP servers from n8n and Higgsfield.
